title: Human lung cancer harbors spatially-organized stem-immunity hubs that associate with response to immunotherapy
author: Chen, Jonathan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Data associated with Chen, Nieman, Spurrell et al "Human lung cancer harbors spatially-organized stem-immunity hubs that associate with response to immunotherapy" Nature Immunology,
Multiplex RNA scope. Processed cell-level data from 3 datasets, separated into manually selected "Stem Immunity" regions and "Tumor" regions, in separate files. (
GeoMx. Unprocessed GeoMex data, with standard fields provided by Nanostring software. (
MERFISH. Transcript-level information, including CellPose and Baysor segmentation. (

Co-registered multispectral RNA and protein images. Processed cell-level data from 46 patients. Patient-level meta data information is available in supplementary table 1, tab B_Patient_Metadata. Fluorophore channel information is Figure 1a. Paper: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41590-024-01792-2
